title: General ManagerRobert
description: General ManagerRobertAs the General Manager of our company, I bring over a decade of diverse leadership experience across FMCG, aviation, logistics and supply chain, telecommunications, and banking. Since joining this organization 1.5 years ago, my mission has been clear: to strategically position us as a market leader in the transport and agricultural trading sectors in Tanzania. With a strong foundation in P&L management, business strategy, and account management, I am committed to driving operational excellence, unlocking value across our business units, and delivering sustainable growth.
